raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ka tad ta KUNGA
Bahrsiba prett jums apskaitstahs/
un aisflehds to Debbesi/ ka Lee-
tus ne nahk/ nn ta Semme fa-
wus Augkus ne dohd/ un juhs
peepechi bohjā eetat no tahs lab-
bas Semmes Wirfus/ ko tas
KUNGS jums dohd.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ecleeezet tad schohs man-
nus Wahrđus juhsu Sirđi/ un
juhsā Dwehfele/ un feeneet tohs
par weenu Sihmi us juhfahm
Rohkahm/ ka tee irr par Pee-
minnefchanas- Sihnehin starp
juhfahm Azzint.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un mahzajc tohs juhfeem
Behrneem/ ka tu no teem run-
na/ tawa Namina fehschoht/ un
us tawn Zeltu staigajoht/ ir ap-
gulloht ir zeltoht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un raksti tohs us tawa
Namina Stendereem/ un pee ta-
wahm Wahrtim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tadeht ka juhsā Deenas
un juhsu Behrnu Deenas wai-
rotas tohp/ wirs tahs Semmes/
ko tas KUNGS juhfeem Teh-
weem swehejs irr winneem doht/
itt ka tahs Debbes Deenas wirs
Semmes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo ja juhs turrefeet wif-
fus schohs Baufsus/ ko es jums
pawehfu tohs darriht/ mihto-
dami to KUNGU juhsu Deewu/
un staigadani wiffus winna Zet-
fōs/ un winnam peefehrdamees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tadi sofihs tas KUNGS
wifas fhihs Tautas juhsu
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wiffa Weeta/ kurp juhfu
Pehda mihs/ jums peederrehbs/
no tahs Tuksneses/ un to Lihba-
nu no tahs Uppes Wrat/ lihd-
tai gallejai Juhrat buhs juhfu
Rohbeschai buht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ne weens preekich jums
pastahwehs/ tas KUNGS juh-
fu Deews weddihs juhsu Istruh-
zinaschann un juhsu Bibjaicha-
nu pahr wiffu to Semmi/ us ko
juhs staigajat/ ittin ka wiꞥsch-
jums irr runnajs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Reds/ es zeltu jums scho-
deen preekcha to Swehtumu un
Lahstus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "To Swehtumn/ ja juhs
klaufigeet ta KUNGA juhsu
Deewa Bausleem/ ko es tcho-
deem jums pawehfu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet tohs Lahstus/ ja juhs
ne klaufigeet ta KUNGA juhsu
Deewa Bausleem/ un atkahpfeet
no ta Zelta/ ko es jums schodeen
pawehfu/ staigadanu zitteem
Deeweem pakkat/ ko juhs ne ef-
fat pasinnuschi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kad tas KUNGS
taws Deews tew eeweddibs tai
Semmē/ us kurren tu eij win-
nu eemantoht/ tad buhs tew to
Swehtumu isfaukt us to Kalnu
Grisim/ un tohs Lahstus us to
Kalnu Gebal.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wui tee ne irr winnapufs
Jardanas/ tur pakkat us to Puſ-
st/ kur ta Saule no-eet/ ceekch to
Rapa-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
